description: A new customer wants to place an order without creating an account.

nodes.task_description: Add items to the cart and proceed to checkout.

expected_outcome.value: The customer is ready to pay.
The customer bypasses the account creation/login step.

nodes.task_description: Enter shipping, billing, and email information and complete the purchase.

expected_outcome.value: The order is successfully placed without requiring the customer to create a password-protected account.
